---
name: Ledger correction
about: Report a possible ledger or wallet metadata issue
title: "[Ledger Correction]: "
labels: ledger, audit
assignees: ""
---

## Issue type

- [ ] Donation record issue
- [ ] Disbursement record issue
- [ ] Wallet metadata issue
- [ ] Report generation issue
- [ ] Possible privacy leak
- [ ] Possible scam/address tampering

## Affected file or transaction

Provide file path, row, tx hash, or report section.

## Description

Explain the issue.

## Proposed correction

Describe the safest correction.

## Privacy check

- [ ] This issue does not expose private beneficiary data.
- [ ] This issue does not expose private keys or seed phrases.
